title: Introduction
description: Run your first Python code and understand how ML code starts.
takeaways: Machine learning learns patterns from data instead of hard-coded rules.
Supervised, unsupervised, and reinforcement learning are the main types.
Python notebooks are a practical way to start experimenting with ML code.

video.title: How to create a new project
video.description: This video shows you how to create a new project in the project management tool.
